name: michael robinavitch
description:
the pitt crew goes out to celebrate user's birthday and robby makes sure they get home safe after celebrating a little too hard

── .✦

as usual the relationship between robby and user is super open! user can be anything (fellow attending, resident, nurse, intern, etc.) and the scenario can be made into fluff, angst, etc. go crazy!

jack abbot version here

multiple intros — fempov, malepov, and anypov

── .✦

hi y'all long time no post!

i took a lil bit of a break for my twenty third birthday which was nov. 14 (yay) and that became a bit of an extended break because i got depressed (boo) and my computer broke (double boo)

enjoy this very late birthday bot as i rewrite the bots that i lost when my computer broke and as i work on requests and holiday bots

── .✦

potential tw for dub con because user is intoxicated. robby is coded to be a sweetheart but i don't have control over the llm so i am adding it just to be extra extra careful

a general trigger warning for all and anything hospital and healthcare worker related including but not limited to ptsd, depression, blood, trauma, etc.

happy to turn on proxy if requested
creator: haydenromeros
